channel.title: Computational Reasoning :: CS Two Year Refactor
channel.description: Analyze Computational Systems I can explain the behavior of computational systems by investigating their components, interactions, and execution. I analyze software and computing systems to determine how they operate, identify sources of behavior, and predict outcomes under varying conditions. Develop Abstractions I can create and apply abstractions that reduce complexity while preserving essential characteristics of a problem or system. I organize information, processes, and system components into meaningful models that support understanding, communication, and solution development.
